mechanism_narrative: A positive 3-month trend in PAYEMS signals expanding labor income and stronger aggregate demand, raising expected revenues and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:as of 2021-11-15 latest PAYEMS vintage for 2021-10 was 148319 thousand
failure_condition: Reject if months with positive 3-month PAYEMS growth do not produce higher average 20-day S&P 500 returns than months with nonpositive growth, or if walk-forward Rank IC is below 0.03 over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL year-over-year inflation crosses far above target while FEDFUNDS remains near zero, equity investors price a future policy tightening shock, compressing valuation multiples and producing negative 60-day returns.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL year-over-year inflation crosses above 5% while FEDFUNDS remains below 0.25%
evidence_refs: fact:as of 2021-11-15 latest CPIAUCSL vintage was 276.724 and latest FEDFUNDS was 0.08
regime_hint: inflation overshoot with policy rate constrained near zero
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations have positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if their mean 60-day return is not below the unconditional mean at p < 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp monthly decline in RSAFS signals a near-term demand shock that lowers expected corporate sales growth, causing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days as investors revise earnings expectations.
evidence_refs: fact:as of 2021-11-15 latest RSAFS vintage for 2021-09 was 625416 million dollars
failure_condition: Reject if 5-day forward S&P 500 returns following RSAFS declines below -1.0% are not lower than unconditional 5-day returns, or if the hit rate for negative returns is below 45%.

mechanism_narrative: Falling INDPRO combined with rising RSAFS identifies demand exceeding supply capacity; the resulting margin pressure and delivery constraints reduce equity returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO 3-month growth crosses below 0% while RSAFS 3-month growth remains above 0%
evidence_refs: fact:as of 2021-11-15 latest INDPRO vintage for 2021-09 was 100.0178
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations have average 20-day S&P 500 returns equal to or above the unconditional average, or if the interaction term INDPRO growth times RSAFS growth is not significant at p < 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: A large downturn in HOUST signals weakening interest-sensitive demand and future construction spending, reducing cyclical earnings expectations and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:as of 2021-11-15 latest HOUST vintage for 2021-09 was 1555 thousand units
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST 3-month declines below -10% are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 65% of triggered cases or by no deterioration relative to baseline returns.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained rise in UNRATE signals labor-market deterioration and recession risk, lowering expected earnings and risk appetite, which produces negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE 3-month change crosses above +0.3 percentage points
evidence_refs: fact:as of 2021-11-15 latest UNRATE vintage for 2021-10 was 4.6 percent
failure_condition: Reject if triggered UNRATE increases are not followed by lower 60-day S&P 500 returns than untriggered periods, or if the triggered negative-return frequency is below 40%.

mechanism_narrative: A rising 3-month trend in FEDFUNDS raises discount rates and tightens financial conditions, reducing the present value of equity cash flows and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:as of 2021-11-15 latest FEDFUNDS vintage for 2021-10 was 0.08 percent
failure_condition: Reject if positive 3-month FEDFUNDS changes are followed by 20-day S&P 500 returns above the unconditional mean in more than 60% of cases, or if rolling 3-year Rank IC is not negative.

mechanism_narrative: Strong GDPC1 growth combined with a falling UNRATE identifies a broad expansion with improving revenues and labor income, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 latest quarter annualized growth exceeds 2% while UNRATE 3-month change is below -0.2 percentage points
evidence_refs: fact:as of 2021-11-15 latest GDPC1 vintage for 2021-07 was 19465.195 billion chained 2017 dollars
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations fail to outperform unconditional 60-day S&P 500 returns by at least 50 basis points on average, or if the joint signal has no positive coefficient in walk-forward tests.
